title: A validated protocol to UV-inactivate SARS-CoV-2 and herpesvirus-infected cells
author: Timothy K. Soh
materials: Screw the lids on the vials

steps.title: Wash each well with 1 mL PBS
steps.instruction: Wash each well with 1 mL PBS

steps.title: Scrape each well (2x10 6 cells) into 1 mL PBS
steps.instruction: Scrape each well (2x10 6 cells) into 1 mL PBS

steps.title: Transfer cells into a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer cells into a 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: Pellet cells at 16000 x g, 4 °C, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Pellet cells at 16000 x g, 4 °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Transfer cells to a tissue vial
steps.instruction: Transfer cells to a tissue vial

steps.title: Mix the cell solution with a micropipette
steps.instruction: Mix the cell solution with a micropipette

steps.title: Repeat irradiation 3 additional times for...
steps.instruction: Repeat irradiation 3 additional times for a total of 10,000 mJ/cm 2

steps.title: Disinfect the outside of the tissue...
steps.instruction: Disinfect the outside of the tissue vials by wiping with Incidin Plus
